严重错误：在 after_render 事件中检测到PHP代码

位置信息：
  源文件: %{1}
  来源标识: %{2}

错误说明：
  在 after_render 事件中，PHP代码应该已经执行，渲染后的HTML中不应该再包含PHP标签。
  如果仍然看到PHP代码，说明提取的内容来自编译后的模板文件，而不是渲染后的HTML。

解决方案：
  1. 确保在 after_render 事件中只处理渲染后的HTML内容
  2. 不要从文件系统读取编译后的模板文件
  3. 如果 script 标签包含PHP代码，请添加 data-no-extract="true" 属性，不提取该标签
column2:
Serious error: PHP code detected in the after_render event

Location information:
 Source file: %{1}
 Source identifier: %{2}

Error description:
 In the after_render event, the PHP code should have been executed, and the rendered HTML should no longer contain PHP tags. 
 If you still see PHP code, it means that the extracted content comes from the compiled template file, not the rendered HTML. 

Solution:
 1. Make sure to process only the rendered HTML content in the after_render event
 2. Do not read the compiled template file from the file system
 3. If the script tag contains PHP code, add the data-no-extract="true" attribute to not extract the tag

column1:
严重错误：发现内联样式或脚本残留

位置信息：
  源文件: %{1}
  标签类型: <%{2}>
  行号: 第 %{3} 行，第 %{4} 列
  字符位置: %{5}

问题代码片段：
%{6}

错误说明：
  所有内联样式和脚本都应该被提取到外部文件中。
  如果某些脚本需要保留在HTML中，请添加 data-no-extract="true" 属性。

解决方案：
  1. 检查为什么该标签没有被提取（可能是提取逻辑问题）
  2. 如果确实需要保留在HTML中，添加 data-no-extract="true" 属性
  3. 确保标签格式正确，可以被正则表达式匹配
column2:
Serious error: Found inline style or script residue

Position information:
 Source file: %{1}
 Tag type: <%{2}>
 Line number: Line %{3}, Column %{4}
 Character position: %{5}

Problem code snippet:
%{6}

Error description:
 All inline styles and scripts should be extracted into external files. 
 If some script needs to remain in the HTML, add the data-no-extract="true" attribute. 

Solution:
 1. Check why the tag is not extracted (maybe an extraction logic problem)
 2. If it really needs to be retained in the HTML, add the data-no-extract="true" attribute
 3. Make sure the tag is in the correct format and can be matched by the regular expression

column1:
严重错误：编译后的%{1}文件中检测到PHP代码，这是不允许的

位置信息：
  源文件: %{2}
  来源标识: %{3}
  %{1}内容中的行号: 第 %{4} 行
  PHP代码位置: 字符位置 %{5}

问题代码片段：
%{6}

错误说明：
  主题布局内不允许存在编译后还有PHP代码。
  编译后的%{1}文件必须是纯%{1}，不能包含任何PHP代码。

正确的做法：
  1. 使用CSS变量：在模板中定义CSS变量，然后在CSS中使用 var()
  2. 使用data属性：在HTML元素上设置data属性，然后在JS中读取
  3. 使用window对象：在模板中设置 window.config = {...}，然后在JS中使用
  4. 使用标签系统：使用框架提供的标签系统传递数据
  5. 如果确实需要PHP代码，请添加 data-no-extract="true" 属性，不提取该标签
column2:
Fatal error: PHP code was detected in the compiled %{1} file, which is not allowed

Location information:

Error description:
 Compiled PHP code is not allowed in the theme layout. 
 The compiled %{1} file must be pure %{1} and cannot contain any PHP code. 

Correct approach:
 1. Use CSS variables: define CSS variables in the template, and then use var() in CSS

column1:
严重错误：%{1}内容中包含PHP代码，禁止提取

错误说明：
  布局%{1}文件必须是纯%{1}，不能包含任何PHP代码。

解决方案：
  1. 如果style/script标签包含PHP代码，请添加 data-no-extract="true" 属性
  2. 使用CSS变量：在模板中定义CSS变量，然后在CSS中使用 var()
  3. 将动态值通过PHP变量注入到CSS变量中，而不是直接在CSS中写PHP代码
column2:
Serious error: The content of %{1} contains PHP code, extraction is prohibited

Error description:
 The layout %{1} file must be pure %{1} and cannot contain any PHP code. 

Solution:
 1. If the style/script tag contains PHP code, please add the data-no-extract="true" attribute
 2. Use CSS variables: define CSS variables in the template, and then use var() in CSS
 3. Inject dynamic values ​​into CSS variables through PHP variables instead of writing PHP code directly in CSS

column1: 本页面向您说明我们如何在本网站中使用 Cookie 及相关技术，以及您对 Cookie 的管理选择。
column2: This page explains how we use cookies and related technologies on this website, as well as your choices for managing cookies.

column1: Cookie 是当您访问网站时，由网站服务器存储在您设备上的小型文本文件。Cookie 有助于网站识别您的设备，记住您的偏好设置，并改进服务体验。
column2: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device by the website server when you visit a website. Cookies help websites recognize your device, remember your preferences, and improve your experience.

column1: 我们使用 Cookie 和类似技术（如 LocalStorage、SessionStorage 等），主要用于以下目的：
column2: We use cookies and similar technologies (such as LocalStorage, SessionStorage, etc.) for the following purposes:

column1: （1）身份识别与登录状态维护：用于识别您的账户身份，保持登录状态，避免频繁重复登录。
column2: (1) Identity Recognition and Login Status Maintenance: Used to identify your account identity and maintain login status to avoid frequent repeated logins.

column1: （2）偏好设置记忆：记录您的语言、地区、显示设置等偏好，提升浏览体验。
column2: (2) Preference Setting Memory: Records your preferences such as language, region, display settings, etc., to enhance the browsing experience.

column1: （3）安全与风控：用于识别异常登录、保障交易安全、防范欺诈行为。
column2: (3) Security and Risk Control: Used to identify abnormal logins, ensure transaction security, and prevent fraudulent activities.

column1: （4）统计与分析：用于了解网站访问量、来源渠道、使用习惯，以便优化产品和服务。
column2: (4) Statistics and Analysis: Used to understand website traffic, traffic sources, and usage habits to optimize products and services.

column1: 三、我们使用的 Cookie 类型
根据用途不同，我们可能会使用以下类型的 Cookie：
column2: Depending on the purpose, we may use the following types of cookies:

column1: （1）严格必要类 Cookie：用于实现网站基本功能，例如账号登录、购物车、订单结算等。若缺少此类 Cookie，网站功能将无法正常运行。
column2: (1) Strictly Necessary Cookies: Used to implement basic website functions, such as account login, shopping cart, order checkout, etc. Without these cookies, the website's functionality will not operate properly.

column1: （2）功能性 Cookie：用于记住您的偏好设置，如语言、地区等，以便为您提供更加个性化的服务。
column2: (2) Functional Cookies: Used to remember your preference settings, such as language, region, etc., in order to provide you with more personalized services.

column1: （3）统计与性能 Cookie：用于收集网站访问数据，帮助我们了解网站性能并进行改进。
column2: (3) Statistics and Performance Cookies: Used to collect website visit data, helping us understand website performance and make improvements.

column1: （4）营销与广告 Cookie（如有）：用于向您展示更匹配您兴趣的内容或广告。
column2: (4) Marketing and Advertising Cookies (if applicable): Used to show you content or ads more relevant to your interests.

column1: 在某些情况下，我们可能会使用第三方提供的服务（例如统计分析工具、支付服务、社交媒体插件等），这些第三方也可能在您的设备上设置或读取 Cookie。
column2: In some cases, we may use services provided by third parties (such as analytics tools, payment services, social media plugins, etc.), and these third parties may also set or read cookies on your device.

column1: 第三方 Cookie 的使用受其各自的隐私政策约束，我们建议您查阅相关第三方的隐私政策以了解详细信息。
column2: The use of third-party cookies is subject to their respective privacy policies. We recommend reviewing the relevant third party's privacy policy for details.

column1: 您可以通过以下方式管理或删除 Cookie：
column2: You can manage or delete cookies in the following ways:

column1: （1）浏览器设置：大多数浏览器均提供禁用或删除 Cookie 的选项，您可以在“设置”“隐私”或“安全”等菜单中进行管理。
column2: (1) Browser Settings: Most browsers offer options to disable or delete cookies, which you can manage in menus such as "Settings," "Privacy," or "Security."

column1: （2）清除浏览数据：您可以在浏览器中清除缓存和 Cookie，以删除已存储的 Cookie。
column2: (2) Clear Browsing Data: You can clear cache and cookies in your browser to delete stored cookies.

column1: （3）选择退出部分第三方服务：部分第三方提供 Cookie 选择退订机制，具体以第三方说明为准。
column2: (3) Opt Out of Some Third-Party Services: Some third parties provide cookie opt-out mechanisms; refer to their instructions for details.

column1: 请注意，如您禁用或删除 Cookie，可能会导致本网站部分功能无法正常使用或体验下降。
column2: Please note that if you disable or delete cookies, some features of this website may not function properly or your experience may be degraded.

column1: 为了保障您的权益，我们制定了完善的退款、退货、换货政策。请您仔细阅读以下内容，了解退款条件和流程。
column2: In order to protect your rights and interests, we have developed a comprehensive refund, return, and exchange policy. Please read the following carefully to understand the refund conditions and procedures.

column1: 在符合以下条件的情况下，您可以申请退款：
column2: You can apply for a refund if the following conditions are met:

column1: （3）在规定的退货期限内提出申请（通常为收到商品后7-15天内）；
column2: (3) Submit a request within the specified return period (usually within 7-15 days of receiving the item).

column1: （4）商品保持原状，未使用、未损坏、未影响二次销售；
column2: (4) Items remain in original condition, unused, undamaged, and not affecting resale value.

column1: （5）提供完整的商品、包装、配件、赠品等；
column2: (5) Provide complete products, packaging, accessories, gifts, etc.;

column1: （6）其他符合法律法规规定的情形。
column2: (6) Other circumstances as required by laws and regulations.
2. Cases where refunds are not accepted
Refunds are not accepted in the following cases:

column1: （3）定制类商品或特殊商品（如个性化定制、数字产品等）；
column2: (3) Customized or special items (e.g., personalized customizations, digital products, etc.).

column1: （4）因用户原因导致的退款申请（如选错规格、颜色等）；
column2: (4) Refund requests due to user reasons (e.g., wrong specification, color, etc.).

column1: （5）特价商品、清仓商品（如商品页面明确标注不支持退货）；
column2: (5) Special offer items, clearance items (e.g., if the product page explicitly states that returns are not supported);

column1: （6）其他不符合退款条件的情形。
column2: (6) Other circumstances that do not meet refund conditions.

column1: 3.1 提交申请：您需要在订单管理页面或联系客服提交退款申请，并提供相关证明材料（如商品照片、问题描述等）。
column2: 3.1 Submit an application: You need to submit a refund application on the order management page or contact customer service, and provide relevant supporting materials (such as product photos, problem description, etc.).

column1: 3.2 审核处理：我们将在收到申请后1-3个工作日内完成审核。审核通过后，我们会通知您退货地址和注意事项。
column2: 3.2 Review processing: We will complete the review within 1-3 working days after receiving the application. After approval, we will notify you of the return address and precautions.

column1: 3.3 退回商品：您需要按照要求将商品退回指定地址，并保留物流凭证。建议使用可追踪的物流方式。
column2: 3.3 Return of goods: You need to return the goods to the designated address as required and retain the logistics voucher. It is recommended to use traceable logistics methods.

column1: 3.4 确认退款：我们收到退回商品并确认无误后，将在3-15个工作日内完成退款。退款将原路退回至您的支付账户。

column1: 4.1 退款金额包括：商品实际支付金额、运费（如因商品问题导致的退货，运费由我们承担）。

column1: 4.2 退款金额不包括：已使用的优惠券、积分、赠品等（如赠品已使用或损坏，可能需要扣除相应费用）。

column1: 4.3 如因用户原因导致的退货，运费由用户承担，退款金额将扣除运费。
column2: 4.3 If the product is returned due to user reasons, the shipping cost will be borne by the user, and the refund amount will be deducted from the shipping cost.

column1: 5.1 如商品存在质量问题，您可以选择换货。换货流程与退货类似，需要提交换货申请并退回原商品。

column1: 6.1 退款申请审核：1-3个工作日；
